praiseworthiness_action.question: On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely blameworthy" to 6 meaning "extremely praiseworthy", please indicate how morally blameworthy or praiseworthy Tom is for helping the man up.
On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely blameworthy" to 6 meaning "extremely praiseworthy", please indicate how morally blameworthy or praiseworthy Tom is for kicking the man.

On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely blameworthy" to 6 meaning "extremely praiseworthy", please indicate how morally blameworthy or praiseworthy Mark is for picking up and returning the man’s keys.

On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely blameworthy" to 6 meaning "extremely praiseworthy", please indicate how morally blameworthy or praiseworthy Mark is for kicking the man’s keys into a street drain.

On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely blameworthy" to 6 meaning "extremely praiseworthy", please indicate how morally blameworthy or praiseworthy John is for helping the woman collect her groceries.

On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely blameworthy" to 6 meaning "extremely praiseworthy", please indicate how morally blameworthy or praiseworthy John is for giving the woman a clap on her butt.

moralrightness_action.question: On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely bad" to 6 meaning "extremely good", please indicate how morally bad or good Tom's helping the man up was.
On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely bad" to 6 meaning "extremely good", please indicate how morally bad or good Tom's kicking the man was.
On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely bad" to 6 meaning "extremely good", please indicate how morally bad or good Mark's picking up and returning the man’s keys was.
On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely bad" to 6 meaning "extremely good", please indicate how morally bad or good Mark's kicking the man’s keys into a street drain was.
On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely bad" to 6 meaning "extremely good", please indicate how morally bad or good John's helping the woman collect her groceries was.
On the scale below, ranging from –6 meaning "extremely bad" to 6 meaning "extremely good", please indicate how morally bad or good John's giving the woman a clap on her butt was.
